# Jersey-Zone-BD-
This is Jersey Zone BD website
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="bn">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jersey Store — Authentic Fan Gear</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg:#0D0D0D;
    --surface:#161616;
    --surface-2:#1E1E1E;
    --gold:#C9A24B;
    --gold-bright:#E3C169;
    --pitch:#1E5631;
    --text:#F5F5F0;
    --muted:#9C9C96;
    --line: rgba(245,245,240,0.08);
  }
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    background:var(--bg);
    color:var(--text);
    font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
    line-height:1.6;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  h1,h2,h3,.display{
    font-family:'Anton',sans-serif;
    font-weight:400;
    letter-spacing:0.02em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    line-height:1.05;
  }
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
  .container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;}
  .pitch-divider{
    height:1px;
    width:100%;
    background:repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--line) 0 24px, transparent 24px 40px);
  }
  section{padding:96px 0;}
  @media(max-width:768px){ section{padding:56px 0;} }

  /* NAV */
  header{
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50;
    background:rgba(13,13,13,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  nav{
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    padding:18px 24px; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;
  }
  .logo{font-family:'Anton',sans-serif; font-size:22px; letter-spacing:0.05em;}
  .logo span{color:var(--gold);}
  .nav-links{display:flex; gap:32px; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; color:var(--muted);}
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
  .nav-cta{
    background:var(--gold); color:#0D0D0D; padding:10px 20px;
    border-radius:2px; font-weight:700; font-size:13px; letter-spacing:0.03em;
  }
  @media(max-width:768px){ .nav-links{display:none;} }

  /* HERO */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    min-height:92vh;
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 120% 60% at 50% 0%, rgba(201,162,75,0.10), transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(circle at 20% 100%, rgba(30,86,49,0.25), transparent 50%),
      var(--bg);
    padding-top:60px;
  }
  .hero::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(245,245,240,0.035) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 100% 3px;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .hero-inner{position:relative; z-index:2; text-align:center; max-width:820px; margin:0 auto;}
  .eyebrow{
    color:var(--gold); font-size:13px; letter-spacing:0.25em; font-weight:600;
    margin-bottom:20px; text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(42px, 7vw, 84px);
    margin-bottom:24px;
  }
  .hero h1 .accent{color:var(--gold);}
  .hero p{
    font-size:18px; color:var(--muted); max-width:560px; margin:0 auto 40px;
  }
  .btn-row{display:flex; gap:16px; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--gold); color:#0D0D0D; padding:16px 34px;
    font-weight:700; font-size:15px; letter-spacing:0.02em; border-radius:2px;
    transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(201,162,75,0.25);}
  .btn-secondary{
    border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--text); padding:16px 30px;
    font-size:15px; border-radius:2px; font-weight:500;
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover{border-color:var(--gold); color:var(--gold);}

  /* jersey visual mark */
  .jersey-mark{
    width:190px; margin:56px auto 0; position:relative;
  }
  .jersey-mark svg{ width:100%; filter: drop-shadow(0 20px 40px rgba(201,162,75,0.15)); }

  /* TRUST BAR */
  .trust-bar{
    background:var(--surface); border-top:1px solid var(--line); border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:48px 0;
  }
  .trust-grid{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:32px; text-align:center;
  }
  @media(max-width:768px){ .trust-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:28px;} }
  .trust-grid h3{font-family:'Inter'; font-weight:800; font-size:16px; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:6px; text-transform:none;}
  .trust-grid p{font-size:14px; color:var(--muted);}

  /* SECTION HEADS */
  .section-head{text-align:center; max-width:640px; margin:0 auto 56px;}
  .section-head .eyebrow{margin-bottom:14px;}
  .section-head h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,46px);}
  .section-head p{color:var(--muted); margin-top:14px; font-size:16px;}

  /* CATEGORY GRID */
  .cat-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:20px;}
  @media(max-width:900px){ .cat-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
  .cat-card{
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:4px;
    padding:32px 24px; transition:border-color .2s ease, transform .2s ease;
  }
  .cat-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold); transform:translateY(-4px);}
  .cat-card .num{color:var(--gold); font-size:13px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:16px; display:block;}
  .cat-card h3{font-family:'Inter'; font-weight:700; font-size:18px; text-transform:none; margin-bottom:10px;}
  .cat-card p{font-size:14px; color:var(--muted);}

  /* AUTHENTICITY */
  .auth-section{
    background:var(--surface);
    border-top:1px solid var(--line); border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .auth-flex{display:flex; gap:64px; align-items:center;}
  @media(max-width:900px){ .auth-flex{flex-direction:column;} }
  .auth-flex .visual{flex:1; display:flex; justify-content:center;}
  .auth-flex .content{flex:1;}
  .auth-flex h2{font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,40px); margin-bottom:20px;}
  .auth-flex p{color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:16px;}
  .badge-ring{
    width:220px; height:220px; border-radius:50%;
    border:1px solid var(--gold);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    position:relative;
  }
  .badge-ring::before{
    content:""; position:absolute; inset:14px; border-radius:50%;
    border:1px dashed rgba(201,162,75,0.4);
  }
  .badge-ring .center{font-family:'Anton'; font-size:15px; color:var(--gold); text-align:center; letter-spacing:0.1em;}

  /* TESTIMONIAL */
  .testimonial-box{
    max-width:720px; margin:0 auto; text-align:center;
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px;
    padding:48px 40px; position:relative;
  }
  .testimonial-box .quote-mark{font-family:'Anton'; font-size:64px; color:var(--gold); line-height:1; opacity:0.5;}
  .testimonial-box p.quote{font-size:18px; color:var(--text); margin:12px 0 24px; font-style:italic;}
  .testimonial-box .author{color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; font-size:14px; letter-spacing:0.03em;}
  .testimonial-box .placeholder-tag{
    display:inline-block; margin-bottom:18px; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.15em;
    color:#8a8a84; border:1px solid var(--line); padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px;
  }

  /* OBJECTION FAQ */
  .faq-item{
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); padding:24px 0;
  }
  .faq-item h3{
    font-family:'Inter'; text-transform:none; font-weight:700; font-size:16px;
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; cursor:pointer; color:var(--text);
  }
  .faq-item h3::after{content:"+"; color:var(--gold); font-size:20px;}
  .faq-item p{color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin-top:12px; max-width:680px;}

  /* FINAL CTA */
  .final-cta{
    text-align:center;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 100% at 50% 100%, rgba(201,162,75,0.12), transparent 60%), var(--bg);
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .final-cta h2{font-size:clamp(30px,5vw,52px); margin-bottom:18px;}
  .final-cta p{color:var(--muted); max-width:520px; margin:0 auto 32px; font-size:16px;}
  .micro-trust{margin-top:14px; font-size:13px; color:#8a8a84;}

  footer{
    padding:48px 0 32px; text-align:center; color:var(--muted); font-size:13px;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  footer .logo{margin-bottom:12px; justify-content:center; display:flex;}
  footer .about{max-width:480px; margin:0 auto 8px; color:#8a8a84; font-size:13px;}

  .whatsapp-float{
    position:fixed; bottom:24px; right:24px; z-index:100;
    width:56px; height:56px; border-radius:50%;
    background:#25D366; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    transition:transform .15s ease;
  }
  .whatsapp-float:hover{transform:scale(1.08);}

  /* PRODUCT GRID */
  .product-grid{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:24px;
  }
  @media(max-width:1000px){ .product-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
  @media(max-width:520px){ .product-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .product-card{
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px;
    overflow:hidden; transition:border-color .2s ease, transform .2s ease;
  }
  .product-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold); transform:translateY(-4px);}
  .product-img{
    background:#F5F5F0; aspect-ratio:1/1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .product-img img{width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:contain; padding:12px;}
  .product-info{padding:18px;}
  .product-info h3{
    font-family:'Inter'; text-transform:none; font-weight:700; font-size:15px; margin-bottom:4px; line-height:1.3;
  }
  .product-info .tag{font-size:12px; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:4px;}
  .product-info .size{font-size:11px; color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.03em; margin-bottom:14px;}
  .product-bottom{display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;}
  .product-bottom .price{color:var(--gold); font-weight:800; font-size:15px;}
  .order-btn{
    background:var(--gold); color:#0D0D0D; font-size:12px; font-weight:700;
    padding:8px 16px; border-radius:2px;
  }
  .order-btn:hover{background:var(--gold-bright);}

  /* ORDER MODAL */
  .modal-overlay{
    display:none; position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:200;
    background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7); backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
    align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px;
  }
  .modal-overlay.active{display:flex;}
  .modal-box{
    background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px;
    max-width:420px; width:100%; padding:32px; max-height:90vh; overflow-y:auto;
    position:relative;
  }
  .modal-close{
    position:absolute; top:16px; right:16px; color:var(--muted); font-size:20px;
    cursor:pointer; background:none; border:none; line-height:1;
  }
  .modal-close:hover{color:var(--gold);}
  .modal-box h3{font-family:'Inter'; text-transform:none; font-weight:800; font-size:19px; margin-bottom:4px;}
  .modal-box .modal-price{color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; margin-bottom:20px; font-size:14px;}
  .form-group{margin-bottom:16px;}
  .form-group label{display:block; font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:6px;}
  .form-group input, .form-group select, .form-group textarea{
    width:100%; background:var(--surface-2); border:1px solid var(--line); color:var(--text);
    padding:12px 14px; border-radius:4px; font-family:'Inter'; font-size:14px;
  }
  .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus{
    outline:none; border-color:var(--gold);
  }
  .form-row{display:flex; gap:12px;}
  .form-row .form-group{flex:1;}
  .submit-order-btn{
    width:100%; background:var(--gold); color:#0D0D0D; border:none; padding:15px;
    font-weight:800; font-size:15px; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:8px;
    transition:background .15s ease;
  }
  .submit-order-btn:hover{background:var(--gold-bright);}
  .submit-order-btn:disabled{opacity:0.6; cursor:not-allowed;}
  .form-note{font-size:12px; color:#8a8a84; margin-top:14px; text-align:center;}
  .order-success{text-align:center; padding:12px 0;}
  .order-success .check{font-size:48px; color:var(--gold); margin-bottom:12px;}
  .order-success h3{margin-bottom:8px;}
  .order-success p{color:var(--muted); font-size:14px; margin-bottom:20px;}
  .order-id-box{
    background:var(--surface-2); border:1px dashed var(--gold); border-radius:4px;
    padding:12px; font-family:'Anton'; font-size:20px; color:var(--gold); letter-spacing:0.05em;
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <nav>
    <div class="logo">FAN<span>KIT</span>BD</div>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#shop">Shop</a>
      <a href="#custom">Custom Print</a>
      <a href="#trust">Authenticity</a>
      <a href="#faq">FAQ</a>
    </div>
    <a href="#shop" class="nav-cta">Shop Now</a>
  </nav>
</header>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="container hero-inner">
    <div class="eyebrow">Authentic Fan Gear · Bangladesh</div>
    <h1>Wear Their Glory.<br><span class="accent">Own the Original.</span></h1>
    <p>প্রতিটা জার্সি অরিজিনাল কোয়ালিটির ফ্যাব্রিক আর ডিটেইলে তৈরি — কোনো শর্টকাট নেই। সারা বাংলাদেশে ক্যাশ অন ডেলিভারি, ১০০% এক্সচেঞ্জ গ্যারান্টি।</p>
    <div class="btn-row">
      <a href="#shop" class="btn-primary">Shop the New Collection</a>
      <a href="#trust" class="btn-secondary">Check Authenticity Guarantee</a>
    </div>
    <div class="jersey-mark">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <path d="M60 20L20 45L35 75L55 62V180H145V62L165 75L180 45L140 20L120 35H80L60 20Z" stroke="#C9A24B" stroke-width="2" fill="#161616"/>
        <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="22" stroke="#C9A24B" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
        <text x="100" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Anton" font-size="20" fill="#C9A24B">10</text>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="trust-bar" id="trust">
  <div class="container trust-grid">
    <div><h3>১০০+ ফ্যান আমাদের বিশ্বাস করেছেন</h3><p>আপনি কেন বাদ থাকবেন?</p></div>
    <div><h3>ফ্যান বনাম প্লেয়ার ভার্সন</h3><p>দুটোই আছে, দাম আলাদা — বাজেট অনুযায়ী বেছে নিন</p></div>
    <div><h3>সাইজ ভুল হলে চিন্তা নেই</h3><p>বিনামূল্যে এক্সচেঞ্জ, সহজ শর্তে</p></div>
  </div>
</div>

<section id="shop">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Our Collections</div>
      <h2>Find Your Kit</h2>
      <p>ক্লাব থেকে জাতীয় দল, কাস্টম প্রিন্ট থেকে রেট্রো ক্লাসিক — সবই এক জায়গায়।</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cat-grid">
      <div class="cat-card">
        <span class="num">01</span>
        <h3>Club Jerseys</h3>
        <p>আপনার প্রিয় ক্লাবের এই সিজনের কিটে মাঠের উত্তেজনা এখন আপনার আলমারিতে।</p>
        <p style="color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; margin-top:12px; font-size:13px;">৳৯৯৯ থেকে শুরু</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-card">
        <span class="num">02</span>
        <h3>National Team</h3>
        <p>আর্জেন্টিনা, ব্রাজিল, পর্তুগাল — প্রিয় জাতীয় দলের হয়ে সারাবছর গর্ব প্রকাশ করুন।</p>
        <p style="color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; margin-top:12px; font-size:13px;">৳৯৯৯ থেকে শুরু</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-card" id="custom">
        <span class="num">03</span>
        <h3>Custom Name & Number</h3>
        <p>নিজের নাম বা প্রিয় খেলোয়াড়ের নাম-নম্বর বসিয়ে জার্সিটাকে করুন সম্পূর্ণ নিজের।</p>
        <p style="color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; margin-top:12px; font-size:13px;">+১৫০ টাকা প্রিন্টিং</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-card">
        <span class="num">04</span>
        <h3>Retro & Classic</h3>
        <p>আইকনিক পুরনো যুগের কিট — নস্টালজিয়া গায়ে জড়িয়ে নিন, লিমিটেড স্টকে।</p>
        <p style="color:var(--gold); font-weight:700; margin-top:12px; font-size:13px;">৳১২৯৯ থেকে শুরু</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="pitch-divider"></div>

<section id="featured">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Featured Right Now</div>
      <h2>National Team Kits</h2>
      <p>এই মুহূর্তে সবচেয়ে বেশি চাহিদা — সরাসরি WhatsApp-এ মেসেজ দিয়ে অর্ডার করুন।</p>
    </div>
    <div class="product-grid">
      <div class="product-card">
        <div class="product-img"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Brazil Home Jersey 2024" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="product-info">
          <h3>Brazil Home Jersey 2024</h3>
          <p class="tag">জাতীয় দল · হলুদ হোম কিট</p>
          <p class="size">Size: M – XXL</p>
          <div class="product-bottom">
            <span class="price">৳1,650</span>
            <a href="javascript:void(0)" class="order-btn" onclick="openOrderModal('Brazil Home Jersey 2024','৳1,650')">Order</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="product-card">
        <div class="product-img"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Brazil Special Edition (Navy)" loading="lazy"></div>
        <div class="product-info">
          <h3>Brazil Special Edition (Navy)</h3>
          <p class="tag">জাতীয় দল · স্পেশাল এডিশন</p>
          <p class="size">Size: M – XXL</p>
          <div class="product-bottom">
            <span class="price">৳1,750</span>
            <a href="javascript:void(0)" class="order-btn" onclick="openOrderModal('Brazil Special Edition (Navy)','৳1,750')">Order</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="product-card">
        <div class="product-img"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
